texto: Ella, if it's magic, then nothing is supposed to happen.
explicacao: Citação de Brad Barkley sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Ella, if it's magic, then nothing is supposed to happen.” articula reflexao, magic, nothing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Ella, if it's magic, then nothing is supposed to happen.

texto: You asked me if I believed in magic, and I said yes, and that's how. You just step out, start pulling your life out of the air. You make friends, you find work you really like doing, you find places. You find diners and Laundromats. You find beaches. You find a junk car and drive it for a month, then lave it beside the road. You find someone to fall in love with you. You make it all up as you go. Or, you know, maybe it makes you up.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brad Barkley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “You asked me if I believed in magic, and I said yes, and that's how. frase_original: You asked me if I believed in magic, and I said yes, and that's how. You just step out, start pulling your life out of the air. You make friends, you find work you really like doing, you find places. You find diners and Laundromats. You find beaches. You find a junk car and drive it for a month, then lave it beside the road. You find someone to fall in love with you. You make it all up as you go. Or, you know, maybe it makes you up.
